title: Tameable Sou Mod
description: It add Sou Hiyori(from YTTD) in Minecraft, which is "tameable"
body:
## Introduction
![title image with logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147bf2fbbb52b61cca6354e6a65e74d43c5a98db.png)

This mod is a fan mod of _Your Turn to Die_ and it adds Sou that is tameable.

## How Can We Meet Him?
![Sou after the raining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4067796c401995707ad93d2d697d8fa9a92b1ef9_0.webp)

He spawns in these following biomes when it is raining in the provided world

- Forest
- Flower Forest
- Birch Forest
- Old Growth Birch Forest
- Dark Forest
- Taiga
- Old Growth Pine Taiga
- Old Growth Spruce Taiga

As you see, untamed Sou wears red scarf so you can easily recognize whether he is already tamed or not.

## What Does Needs to Tame Him?
 
If you want to tame him just feed him one of these following food items(custom items included)
![french pottage, apple sauce, and beetroot soup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ace373ae9e581b4970fd32f4184c6f2eb0b1cb70.png)

Don't worry. You can get those' recipes as soon as you get a bowl in game.

## What Can We Do If We Tame Him?

He won't simply follow you even if you tame him. If you craft a Miner's Helmet and put it on him, he will immediately follw you and give you a Night Vision effect as well.

![Sou with a Miner's on himself](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a933bae1af1e0207797a2caa5c4c2af6dd6839_0.webp)

Besides, You can also craft some clothings for him and if you wanna take it off, just right click on him with a shear on main-hand and it will be taken off, including a helmet.

If you cannot affort to craft a helmet, use a whistle, which can be made with two copper ingots. Then tamed Sou nearby his owner would follow them temporarily.

![Sou with a froggy raincoat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/071b387b6cc52bac16a108b83d864e9f7d45459f_0.webp)

There are more clothing if you try out the mod and the clothings' recipes will be unlocked if you tame him.

## Paintings

![custome paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dcf40fa4d7a0dc02123d284cead72c62a984084_0.webp)
